title: アオハル杯4戦目にむけて・強敵の予感

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finally, it's time for the fourth preseason match of
the Unity Cup!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Breathe in... breathe out... and focus!
choice_data_list: Looks like you're ready to go!
Looks like you're ready to go!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Mm-hm, I want to be extra prepared. We're going
up against an undefeated team, right?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: They must be really good, if they've never lost...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: So I've got to try my absolute hardest today!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Yep! Hehe... I'm nervous, but I may also be
getting a little... excited.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I think, um... it'd probably make everyone really
happy if we won today's match.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Our opponents might be tough, but we've all
been training really hard for this, so we're all
really tough too!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
That's why... I know we'll be fine. We've done it so
many times in practice, haven't we? So now... We
just have to do it for real!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Right! I'll do my very best!
